input.prBody: Refines type-safety in the extension command flow.

taskContext.title: Replace any-based git change parsing with typed handling
taskContext.description: The PR should remove unsafe any usage from git change collection and preserve command behavior. The business requirement is to keep PR comment context collection stable while tightening type-safety.
acceptanceCriteria: Git change parsing no longer relies on any
Status labels still resolve for modified, added and deleted files
PR comment validation keeps collecting changed files for review context
